ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "station_type" INTEGER /* Type of weather station (foreign key referencing weather_station_types) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for maintaining the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_station_type FOREIGN KEY ("station_type") REFERENCES weather_station_types ("station_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "createdate" TEXT /* Date and time the weather observation was made */,
  "pa_ins" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (inches of mercury) at the weather station */,
  "pa_qnh" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (inches of mercury) at sea level */,
  "pa_qfe_ad" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (inches of mercury) at the weather station adjusted to sea level */,
  "pa_qff" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (inches of mercury) at the weather station adjusted to sea level using a different method */,
  "tl" REAL /* Temperature (°F) at the weather station */,
  "alt" REAL /* Altitude (feet) of the weather station */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (mph) at the weather station */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction (°) at the weather station */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity (%) at the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_types" (
  "station_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station type */,
  "station_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather station type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the weather station type (e.g., airport, surface, radar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" INTEGER /* Format of the data file (foreign key referencing data_formats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_file_format FOREIGN KEY ("file_format") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation data the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., weather station name) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata (e.g., New York Airport) */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation data the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the status belongs to */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead (foreign key referencing users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team membership */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the user belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key referencing users) */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
